summary.rules: 5-year backtest. Signal: RRG improving -> leading. Entry: signal candle high breakout only when close is above 50 MA and 200 MA, with 50 MA > 200 MA. Initial SL: previous 20-bar swing low. Risk: Rs 10,000 per stock. Book half at +30%. Exit remaining on close below 50 MA.
